title: Review standalone entry point implementation
description: Review the complete implementation: verify pypptx.py exactly matches the spec pattern (correct _DEPS list, correct sys.prefix guard, correct venv creation and pip install invocation, correct os.execv call, correct sys.path setup, shebang present, file is executable), verify .gitignore covers .venv/, verify tests are comprehensive and pass, verify CLAUDE.md no longer references 'in development', and verify the pypptx/ package directory and pyproject.toml are completely unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: pypptx.py implementation matches the spec pattern exactly
sys.prefix guard uses 'in' membership check against str(_VENV)
tests/test_standalone.py covers all four scenarios (guard, version, first-run, second-run)
uv run pytest passes with no regressions
CLAUDE.md accurately describes the standalone entry point as available
pypptx/ package and pyproject.toml are byte-for-byte identical to pre-implementation
